steps.canonical_text: Call emergency services now for this burn. Burns to the face, hands, feet, genitals, large areas, deep burns, or burns affecting breathing need urgent care.
Cool the burn with cool running water for up to 20 minutes if it is safe to do so and the person is not shivering.
Remove rings, watches, or loose clothing near the burn before swelling starts. Do not peel away clothing stuck to the burn.
Loosely cover the burn with a clean cloth or gauze and keep watching breathing until emergency help arrives.
